title: Sorbet
description: A comprehensive modpack with utilities, performance mods, and plenty of nice-to-haves configured for SMPs.
body: ![Sorbet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/626875649737ad203998333cc77e93b765655239.png) A comprehensive modpack aiming to combine utilities, performance mods, and plenty of nice-to-haves in one pack meant for SMPs. Check out the sister modpack [Sherbert](https://modrinth.com/modpack/Sherbert)! ## Features - **Quick Setup** - Included configurations make Sorbet easy to get started with and are designed to run well on every system. - **Extra Features** - Sorbet includes many mods to improve your playing experience. - **Universally Compatible** - Sorbet, with the power of ViaFabricPlus, can join almost any Vanilla server. - **OptiFine Parity** - Sorbet aims to be compatible with OptiFine features like texture packs, shaders, and more. - **Performance** - Sorbet has a heavy focus on performing well in almost any environment without compromising on graphics or gameplay. - **Enhanced SMP Features** - Mods like [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei), [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin), and more improve the experience on SMPs. - **Open Source & Extensible** - All of Sorbet's code and configs are open-source. Add any mods you like and use the included guidelines (in the docs folder on github) to use ST Family tooling for your own packs. **Release** versions are feature-complete and polished.\ **Beta** versions may be missing minor mods or functionality.\ **Alpha** are missing major mods or functionality and may have major issues. ## Disclaimers By using Sorbet, you agree to the following: Sorbet is designed with server mod rules in mind, but may not follow all of them. It is your responsibility to verify whether Sorbet is compliant with any specific server's rules. By installing this modpack you agree that the modpack author, the mod developers and Mojang provide no warranties for using this modpack, every action you do with it is your own. Sorbet and its developers cannot be held accountable for any action executed by included mods that may be harmful or undesireable to the users. Sorbet is inspired by [Fabulously Optimized](https://download.fo), and often takes pointers from their great work. Thank you, FO team!
